description.value:
A well-worn coat of dark oiled hide, its whole front a patchwork of little buckled pockets, loops and tool-straps. A gift from Izudin, cut small for a tengu's frame. One breast pocket is deeper than it has any right to be: reach in, and the coat hands you whatever you were about to need.

The Bottomless Pocket. While you wear the coat you are never caught without a tool. You count as carrying any mundane tool or tool kit that an action requires, and you can draw one out with an Interact; a drawn tool lasts up to 1 hour, then dissolves into nothing. The pocket's tools are of expert make, so you gain a +1 item bonus to Crafting.
